name: modal
description: Run Python code in the cloud with serverless containers, GPUs, and autoscaling. Use when deploying ML models, running batch processing jobs, scheduling compute-intensive tasks, or serving APIs that require GPU acceleration or dynamic scaling.
capabilities: Deploy Python functions to serverless cloud containers with GPU support
Scale automatically from zero to thousands of parallel containers
Run scheduled cron jobs for periodic data processing and model retraining
Persist data across runs using distributed volumes for model weights and datasets
Securely manage API keys and credentials through Modal Secrets
Serve HTTP endpoints and APIs with automatic HTTPS and custom domains
author: davila7
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill containing no executable code. All 566 static findings are false positives - the scanner misinterpreted markdown documentation examples as executable code. The skill contains only Markdown files explaining how to use the Modal cloud platform, with no Python files, scripts, or actual command execution capabilities.
valueStatement: Running ML models and batch processing locally is slow and expensive. Modal lets you deploy Python functions to the cloud with automatic GPU access, containers that scale from zero to thousands, and pay-only-for-compute billing.
userTitle: Deploy Python to cloud with GPUs and autoscaling
limitations: Requires Modal account and authentication token for cloud access
Cloud resources incur costs based on compute usage beyond free credits
Limited to Python workloads; other languages require custom Docker images
Cold starts may cause latency on first request after idle periods

useCases.title: Deploy ML model inference
useCases.description: Serve transformer models and custom ML models with GPU acceleration and automatic scaling

useCases.title: Run batch data processing
useCases.description: Process large datasets in parallel across hundreds of containers without managing infrastructure

useCases.title: Schedule compute jobs
useCases.description: Automate periodic tasks like model retraining, data pipelines, and report generation

promptTemplates.title: Basic model deployment
promptTemplates.scenario: Deploy a Python ML model to Modal
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me deploy a Hugging Face transformer model to Modal for inference. I want to use an L40S GPU and serve predictions via a web endpoint.

promptTemplates.title: Batch processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Modal script that processes 1000 CSV files in parallel across multiple containers using .map(). Each file needs CPU and memory resources.

promptTemplates.title: Scheduled training
promptTemplates.prompt: Set up a weekly scheduled job on Modal that retrains my model on new data every Sunday at 2 AM UTC. Include GPU access and checkpoint saving to a Volume.

promptTemplates.title: Web API with secrets
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a Modal web endpoint that uses FastAPI, requires bearer token authentication, and accesses external APIs using Modal Secrets for credentials.

bestPractices: Pin package versions in image definitions for reproducible builds
Use Volumes to store model weights and avoid re-downloading on each run
Configure min_containers to reduce cold start latency for production APIs
antiPatterns: Hardcoding API keys in code instead of using Modal Secrets
Processing items one-by-one instead of using .map() for parallel execution
Forgetting to call volume.commit() after writing data that needs to persist

faq.question: Is Modal free to use?
faq.answer: Modal offers $30/month in free credits for new accounts. Pay only for compute used beyond that.

faq.question: What GPU types are available?
faq.answer: T4, L4, A10, A100 (40GB/80GB), L40S, H100, H200, and B200. L40S offers best value for inference.

faq.question: How does Modal integrate with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Install the Modal skill, then write Python functions decorated with @app.function() to run code remotely.

faq.question: Is my data safe on Modal?
faq.answer: Modal encrypts data at rest and in transit. Secrets are encrypted and not logged.

faq.question: Why am I getting timeout errors?
faq.answer: Default function timeout is 5 minutes. Increase with @app.function(timeout=3600) for longer operations.

faq.question: How does Modal compare to AWS Lambda?
faq.answer: Modal offers better GPU support, longer timeouts (up to 24 hours), and persistent storage via Volumes.
